summary.key_theme: Qualcomm 正處於 AI 轉型期，市場對其在邊緣 AI 與資料中心領域的成長潛力與高估值之間存在顯著分歧。

bullish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 受惠於與 Stellantis 的合作消息，股價單日飆升 12 %，顯示市場對其車用晶片業務的強勁信心。

bullish.title: What Is Going On With Qualcomm Stock On Thursday?
bullish.reason: 受惠於 AI 智慧型手機市場 32 % 的爆發性成長預期，以及在邊緣 AI 領域的技術領先地位，推動股價上漲。

bullish.title: Melius Research Raises Qualcomm (QCOM) Price Target, Sees More Upside in AI Semiconductor Stocks
bullish.reason: Melius Research 基於 AI 半導體產業的長期成長趨勢，上調了 Qualcomm 的目標價，強化了市場看多情緒。

bullish.title: Is Qualcomm Inc. (QCOM) a Top tech Stock in Ken Fisher Portfolio on Data Center Opportunities?
bullish.reason: 知名投資人 Ken Fisher 將 Qualcomm 列為其投資組合中的重點科技股，顯示機構投資人對其資料中心轉型策略的認可。

bullish.title: Does Qualcomm (QCOM) Have the Flexibility to Capitalize on AI Opportunities?
bullish.reason: Sound Shore Management 的投資信件探討了公司在 AI 領域的靈活性，肯定了其資本配置能力。

bearish.title: Qualcomm: Get Out Before The Reality Sets In Later (Rating Downgrade)
bearish.reason: 分析師給出降評，理由是股價估值過高，且公司對於 AI 資料中心業務的具體執行細節缺乏透明度。

bearish.title: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Is Down 7.0% After New Hyperscaler Deal Highlights AI Ambitions Over Handset Risks
bearish.reason: 儘管有新的超大規模資料中心客戶，但市場擔憂其核心手機業務的風險，導致股價下跌 7 %。

bearish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Valuation In Focus After Semiconductor Selloff And AI Rally Cooldown
bearish.reason: 半導體類股整體回調，投資人開始重新審視 Qualcomm 在 AI 熱潮後的過高估值。

bearish.title: Why Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
bearish.reason: 受整體半導體板塊拋售潮影響，股價出現 4 % 的短期修正。

bearish.title: Qualcomm Cofounder's Granddaughter, Now In Congress, Sells Almost $2 Million In QCOM Near Record High
bearish.reason: 國會議員（創辦人後代）在股價接近歷史高點時拋售價值近 200 萬美元的股票，可能引發市場對股價頂部的擔憂。

neutral.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) Presents at J.P. Morgan 54th Annual Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 公司參與摩根大通科技會議，主要為例行性業務說明，未發布重大影響股價的利多或利空消息。

neutral.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
neutral.reason: 此篇為與首篇利多新聞重複之報導，僅作為市場波動的總結，無額外增量資訊。
